name: Sinthan Top
description: A magnificent mountain pass sitting at an altitude of 3,800 meters. It offers a spectacular 360-degree panoramic view of both the Kashmir and Jammu valleys.
history: Traditionally a highly challenging mountain crossing connecting the Kashmir valley to the Chenab valley in the Jammu region.
famousFor: 360-degree views, snow virtually year-round, thrilling drive.
bestTime: May to October (Closed in heavy winter)
